siteTitle: Clipping for Ecommerce: The fastest way to go viral
siteDescription: Social media clipping takes incredible content and makes it go viral across Instagram, Meta, TikTok, and YouTube shorts.

articles.title: How to Identify Viral Product Moments in Long Form Content
articles.metaDescription: Learn to identify viral product moments in long form videos using frame-by-frame analysis. Find unboxings, reactions, and transformations that convert.

articles.title: Product Demo Clipping Strategy: Extract More From 5-Minute Videos
articles.metaDescription: Master the product demo clipping strategy to extract multiple unique clips from short demos. Learn optimal lengths, sequencing tactics, and platform rules.

articles.metaDescription: Learn when clipping user generated content outperforms brand videos for your ecommerce store. Decision framework, ROI data, and platform-specific guidance.

articles.metaDescription: Learn to batch clip videos efficiently with proven folder systems, naming conventions, and quality checkpoints that scale your production without sacrificing quality.

articles.metaDescription: Learn systematic methods for testing video hooks on products with 5 variation frameworks, script templates, and statistical thresholds to find winning clips.

articles.title: Video Posting Frequency Strategy: How Many Clips Per Day
articles.metaDescription: Master your video posting frequency strategy with data-backed posting schedules for TikTok, Instagram, and YouTube Shorts based on team size and follower count.

articles.title: Why Some Product Clips Die at 200 Views and How to Fix It
articles.metaDescription: Fix low video views with this diagnostic framework. Learn why product clips fail to reach distribution thresholds and solve technical, strategic, and platform issues.

articles.metaDescription: Learn exactly when to post product clips to Instagram grid vs Reels. Get the decision matrix, shop visit data, and conversion strategies that actually work.

articles.metaDescription: Master instagram product video audio with data-backed strategies for trending sounds vs original audio. Category-specific recommendations for higher conversions.

articles.metaDescription: Master instagram product hashtag strategy with data-backed tactics for branded, category, and niche tags. Avoid spam filters and boost your product clip reach.

articles.metaDescription: Build a youtube shorts subscriber funnel that converts casual viewers into long form subscribers. Learn CTA placement, content sequencing, and analytics tracking.
